prompt_text:
### Demographics: 51-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.2 kg; Height 168.3 cm; BMI 21.6 kg/m²; Blood pressure 142/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.8%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 200mg/dL; 6 months ago 170mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.8kg; 9 months ago 60.1kg; 6 months ago 61.3kg; 3 months ago 56.8kg; current 61.2kg), Height (12 months ago 168.3cm; 9 months ago 168.3cm; 6 months ago 168.3cm; 3 months ago 168.3cm; current 168.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 21.6kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 141mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 137mmHg; current 142mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 23U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 9.0mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 125mg/g; 9 months ago 132mg/g; 6 months ago 117mg/g; 3 months ago 159mg/g; current 151mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 80mg/dL; 3 months ago 86mg/dL; current 82mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 37mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 41mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 141mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 152mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.10 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
